content:
# Emulsified Acid System

**Summary**: A water-in-oil emulsion containing acid used to provide retarded reaction rates in carbonate reservoirs.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] studied emulsified-acid-system (EAS) as a primary vehicle for acid delivery.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Used to overcome the limitations of conventional acid systems in carbonate reservoirs.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Evaluation of viscosity, stability, and flow behavior.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- EAS provides reduced or retarded reaction rates of acid due to the oil's external phase. ([[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023, p. 17]])
- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Showed consistent results after flow experiments.
